name: Chicken Kona
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Place the seasoned chicken in a crockpot.
3. In a separate bowl, combine green onions, soy sauce, wine, and water.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken in the crockpot.
5. Cover and cook on low for 3-4 hours.
6. Remove the cooked chicken from the crockpot.
7. Arrange the chicken on a broiler pan.
8. Brush the chicken with honey several times.
9. Broil until the chicken is golden brown, brushing with additional honey as needed.
10. Alternatively, you can place the chicken on a grill instead of using a broiler pan.
